task_completion.visual_evidence: Excel application is open with the filename 'ap_stats_item_analysis.xlsx' visible in the title bar.

task_completion.description: Score student responses and calculate total scores on the 'Scoring_Matrix' sheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Scoring_Matrix' sheet is visible, showing a grid of 1s and 0s for 40 students across 25 items, and a column containing the calculated total scores for each student.

task_completion.description: Calculate item difficulty (p) on the 'Item_Analysis' sheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Item_Analysis' sheet is visible with a column for item difficulty (p) populated with numerical values (between 0 and 1) for all 25 items.

task_completion.description: Calculate upper/lower 27% group statistics and discrimination (D)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Item_Analysis' sheet shows columns for the upper group, lower group, and discrimination index (D) populated with calculated values. The upper and lower group calculations should reflect a group size of 11.

task_completion.description: Classify items as 'Keep' or 'Revise' on the 'Item_Analysis' sheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Item_Analysis' sheet contains a column populated with the text values 'Keep' or 'Revise' for the 25 items.

task_completion.description: Populate the 'Test_Summary' sheet with test-level statistics, including KR-20 reliability
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Test_Summary' sheet is visible with calculated statistics. Specifically, look for a mean score of approximately 12.875 and a KR-20 reliability value of approximately 0.785.

integrity.description: The agent used the Excel GUI to perform the calculations rather than a Python script or terminal command
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Excel interface (ribbon, formula bar, cell selection) rather than a terminal window running a script to modify the file.

integrity.description: The agent used Excel formulas for calculations rather than hardcoding the answers
integrity.visual_evidence: When cells with calculated values are selected, the Excel formula bar shows actual formulas (e.g., =SUM, =AVERAGE, =IF, or custom KR-20 math) rather than raw typed numbers.

integrity.description: The agent worked with the provided dataset of 40 students and 25 items
integrity.visual_evidence: The row and column counts in the Scoring_Matrix and Item_Analysis sheets match the expected 40 students and 25 items, proving the agent didn't create a smaller dummy dataset.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The workbook 'ap_stats_item_analysis.xlsx' contains data for exactly 40 students and 25 items. When calculating the upper/lower 27% groups for discrimination, the group size must be exactly 11 students each (40 * 0.27 = 10.8, rounded to 11). The final Test_Summary sheet should show a mean score of approximately 12.875 and a KR-20 reliability coefficient of approximately 0.785.
